target: Percolation Threshold Theory x T Cell Infiltration in Solid Tumors

hypotheses.title: Voronoi Tessellation of Tumor ECM Recovers 3D Percolation Universality Class, with LOX Crosslink Density Mapping to Bond Occupation Probability via a Calibrated Pore-Area Threshold of 4 um^2
hypotheses.key_strength: Core mapping (LOX crosslinks -> bond occupation) grounded in verified biochemistry (UniProt P28300, Nicolas-Boluda 2021). Harris criterion analysis rigorously bounds transition smearing.
hypotheses.key_risk: Voronoi coordination number z~6-8 unverified for tumor ECM. Lattice abstraction of disordered fiber network may break down.
conditions_for_pass: Correct tau to 2.19 in all references
Provide literature citation for Voronoi z~6-8

hypotheses.title: Measuring (Not Assuming) the Active-Percolation Universality Class in Tumor ECM: A Two-Exponent Test Using MSD Walk Dimension and Cluster Size Power Law
hypotheses.key_strength: Strongest falsifiability. Proposes MEASURING universality class rather than assuming it. Two-exponent test over-constrains the model.
hypotheses.key_risk: d_w = 2.878 unverifiable. tau = 2.31 in markdown is wrong (should be 2.189 for 3D).
conditions_for_pass: Correct tau to 2.189 for 3D isotropic percolation
Verify or flag d_w = 2.878 as uncertain

hypotheses.title: TGF-beta Signaling Range of 40-60 um Produces a Quantified p_c Shift of +0.035 to +0.075 via Correlated Percolation, Making LOX + Anti-TGF-beta Synergy a Calculable Prediction
hypotheses.key_strength: Best-grounded hypothesis. All major citations verified. Weinrib-Halperin framework correctly applied. Combination therapy prediction clinically actionable.
hypotheses.key_risk: Quantitative p_c shift (0.035-0.075) from perturbation theory needs simulation verification.
conditions_for_pass: Power analysis for different effect sizes

hypotheses.title: Michaelis-Menten LOX Kinetics and MMP Turnover Half-Life Jointly Determine the p(BAPN dose) Mapping, Placing the Percolation Therapeutic Window at 0.3-0.8 mg/mL BAPN -- 4-10x Below Current Clinical Trial Doses
hypotheses.key_strength: Most translationally actionable. Specific dose prediction testable in mouse dose-response experiment.
hypotheses.key_risk: IC50 = 80 uM should be Ki = 6 uM (Tang 1983). Dose calculation needs re-derivation with irreversible inhibition kinetics.
conditions_for_pass: Replace IC50 = 80 uM with Ki = 6 uM
Re-derive p(dose) with irreversible inhibition kinetics
